title: APS-200 Common Object Contract
description: Schema for the Common Object Contract fields required on every APS-200 entity (APS-200 Section 4).

object_id.description: Globally unique identifier. TODO: define format (UUID v4 recommended).

protocol_version.description: APS version this object conforms to. TODO: define version format.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this entity definition.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of object creation.

integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical serialization of this object. TODO: define canonical serialization algorithm.
